pattern: A preorder serialization where parentheses wrap each child, with the only subtlety being that a present right child forces an empty pair to stand in for an absent left child.
hints: Build the string in preorder: write a node's value, then recurse into its children wrapped in parentheses.
A node with no children needs no parentheses at all, and a node with only a left child needs only the left pair.
The single tricky case is a right child with no left sibling: you must emit an empty () for the missing left so the structure stays unambiguous.

edge_inputs.description: right child present, left absent needs empty pair
only a right child at the root

stress.description: random non-empty level-order tree with holes
